fixes LevelGrid plotting bug
tags new ClimaCore patch release so this can be used by coupler and atmos

works in ClimaCoupler here: https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-ci/builds/2208#

closes #1571

body:
This addresses the multiple-sync issue we're seeing on GPUs, and also simplifies the interface considerably.
